news.headline: TCM Group A/S will hold its Annual General Meeting, no further details provided.
news.summary: Company announcement: In a recent development, a major corporation has reported a significant increase in its quarterly revenue. The company saw a 15% rise in revenue compared to the previous quarter, reaching a total of $1.5 billion. This growth has been attributed to a successful launch of new products and expansion into international markets. Additionally, the company announced a 10% decrease in operating costs, leading to a boost in net profits by 20% to $500 million. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the company's performance and outlined plans for further growth and innovation in future quarters.

news.headline: Stellantis Pro One and IVECO collaborate to supply 2 electric IVECO vans; based on SMB and LGB platforms; GVW 2.8-4.25.
news.summary: In Amsterdam and Turin on March 14, 2025, Stellantis Pro One, a division of Stellantis N.V. specializing in commercial vehicles, and IVECO, a brand of Iveco Group N.V. (EXM: IVG) known for producing light, medium, and heavy commercial vehicles, have announced a partnership. The agreement involves supplying two all-electric Light Commercial Vehicles (LCVs) to IVECO for the European market. These electric vehicles will be built on the Stellantis Pro One mid-size and large van platforms, offering Gross Vehicle Weights (GVW) ranging from 2.8 to 4.25.

news.headline: Sectra's nine-month interim report shows they have industry's most satisfied customers for 12th year.
news.summary: In Linköping, Sweden on March 14, 2025, Sectra, a global medical imaging IT and cybersecurity firm (STO: SECT B), announced that its radiology enterprise imaging module has been rated as the top choice by users globally. They also have the highest level of customer satisfaction in the field of digital pathology. This achievement reflects Sectra's leading position in the industry and its commitment to providing top-notch solutions for medical imaging and cybersecurity.

news.headline: ECB's Villeroy: We will bring inflation to 2% this year in Europe.
UniCredit can now own up to 29.9% of Commerzbank as per ECB approval, report says.
Nomination Committee suggests adding Victoire de Margerie to Boliden's board at AGM on April 23, 2025.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, the Nomination Committee of Boliden AB (publ) recommended electing Victoire de Margerie as a new Board Member at the upcoming Annual General Meeting on April 23, 2025. Additionally, the committee suggested the re-election of all existing Board members.

news.headline: DentScribe.ai's AI technology eliminates late-night paperwork for dentists, allowing focus on patients.
news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California on March 13, 2025, Dr. Vinni K. Singh introduced DentScribe, an AI-powered innovation. This technology aims to streamline dental appointments, allowing practitioners to leave work on time and prioritize family time. With DentScribe, dentists can efficiently complete their tasks without the need to stay late for charting. This development could potentially benefit thousands of dental practitioners by saving them time and enabling them to focus on important personal moments.

news.headline: Iran and China urge to lift restrictions after Tehran rejected negotiations with Trump.
Former CEO of Adidas and Henkel, Kasper Rørsted, joins AI-robotics company Circus SE, a leader in AI software for food service (XETRA: CA1).
news.summary: Circus SE, a prominent company in AI software and embodied AI-robotics for the food service sector, has revealed that Kasper Rørsted, ex-CEO of Adidas and Henkel, will be joining its Board of Advisors. The company, listed as XETRA: CA1, is renowned globally for its innovative solutions. Rørsted's appointment brings his wealth of experience in steering renowned brands and handling intricate, rapidly growing enterprises on a global level. As Circus SE pioneers the transition to smart systems through AI-robotics, Rørsted's expertise is expected to significantly enhance their strategic initiatives.

news.headline: New study by Photocure ASA shows Blue Light Cystoscopy reduces bladder cancer recurrence risk; published in JU Open Plus.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on March 14, 2025, Photocure ASA (OSE: PHO), a leading Bladder Cancer Company, released a study titled "Oncologic Outcomes of Blue Light Cystoscopy in an Equal Access Setting: Results of the BRAVO study" in JU Open Plus. The study focuses on the impact of blue light cystoscopy on oncologic outcomes in an equal access setting. This research publication is significant for the medical community as it sheds light on the effectiveness of this diagnostic technique.

news.headline: Bekaert provides 90 million euros update on share buyback program and liquidity agreement.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, marking a significant improvement from the 5.1% reported last month. The data also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs during the same period, surpassing expectations. This positive trend is seen as a promising sign for the overall economic recovery, despite ongoing challenges in certain sectors. Additionally, the report indicated a rise in average hourly wages by 2.5%, reflecting potential improvements in income levels for workers. Experts believe that these developments could contribute to a more stable and prosperous economic landscape in the coming months.

news.headline: OCI Global CEO, Hassan Badrawi, reports successful strategic transactions in 2024, strengthening balance sheet significantly.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on March 14, 2025, Hassan Badrawi, the CEO of OCI Global, stated that the year 2024 marked a significant period of change for the company. Several strategic transactions were successfully completed, leading to a notable improvement in the company's financial position. The balance sheet was strengthened, and outstanding outcomes were achieved.

news.headline: AFM investigation into Azerion trading irregularities concludes without penalties for company or major shareholders.
news.summary: On 14 March 2025 in Amsterdam, Azerion disclosed that the Autoriteit Financiële Markten (AFM) has finalized its probe into trading irregularities concerning Azerion shares as previously disclosed in a press release on 13 March 2023. Following the investigation, the AFM decided not to impose any penalties on Azerion or its primary stakeholders. The AFM issued a statement today regarding the matter.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - NZD, AUD, CAD, USD, EUR, GBP, CHF, JPY - Weakest
Oma Savings Bank Plc's 2024 financial report and statements are now available.
news.summary: In the latest data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. This decrease represents approximately 250,000 more people finding employment. Additionally, the economy has seen significant growth, with a 4.5% increase in GDP last quarter. The stock market has also experienced a notable boost, with the main index rising by 15% in the last year. These positive indicators suggest a strong and thriving economy, benefiting both the job market and investors.

news.headline: Aegon launches community investment program with Bermuda Foundation, focusing on education, financial empowerment, and grant support. Strengthening ties with Bermuda.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, The Hague witnessed the unveiling of Aegon’s latest initiative – a community investment program aimed at bolstering the Bermuda community. This move aligns seamlessly with Aegon’s ethos of empowering individuals to lead fulfilling lives. The comprehensive program comprises three vital elements: educational initiatives, financial and social empowerment projects, along with a substantial grant earmarked for the Bermuda Foundation. This venture serves to fortify Aegon's longstanding ties with Bermuda, originating two decades back with the establishment of Transamerica Life Bermuda, an Aegon subsidiary. The bond was further reinforced by Aegon's relocation of its legal headquarters to Bermuda in September 2023.

news.headline: CoreWeave and Bulk Infrastructure team up for one of Europe's largest NVIDIA AI deployments at N01 Datacenter Campus.
news.summary: Norwegian company CoreWeave, known as an AI Hyperscaler™, and Bulk Infrastructure are partnering to create a major NVIDIA AI deployment in Europe. This collaboration will take place at the N01 Datacenter Campus in Norway. This venture is set to become one of the largest NVIDIA AI deployments in the region. The partnership between CoreWeave and Bulk Infrastructure signifies a significant step in fostering advanced AI capabilities, thereby enhancing digital infrastructure. The decision to establish this deployment in Europe reflects a strategic move to bolster AI technology in the region.

137th Canton Fair promoting trade ties in Middle East through successful events in Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE. Largest fair in China.
news.summary: In April 2025, the 137th edition of the Canton Fair, known as China's largest trade fair, is set to take place in Guangzhou. Preparations for the fair have been underway, including a successful Middle East roadshow in February, which featured trade promotion events in Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates. This annual fair serves as a crucial platform for businesses to showcase their products and services, with a wide range of industries represented. The previous edition of the fair attracted over 200,000 buyers and garnered significant attention from both domestic and international participants.

news.headline: NORBIT's segment PIR secures NOK 260 million orders from defence and security sector client. Deliveries to start immediately.
news.summary: In an announcement made in Trondheim on 14th March 2025, NORBIT reported that its PIR segment secured orders valued at around NOK 260 million from a confidential contract manufacturing partner operating in the defense and security field. The delivery process for these contracts will begin promptly, with a significant portion of the orders set for completion in the second quarter of 2025.

news.headline: US court approves Three Arrows to raise FTX claim to $1.53B from $120M, rejecting FTX's objections and citing delays in sharing info.
news.summary: A US bankruptcy court has approved an increase in the claim by liquidators of Three Arrows Capital (3AC) against FTX from $120 million to $1.53 billion. Chief Judge John Dorsey dismissed FTX's objections stating that the delay in amending the claim was due to FTX's failure to provide relevant information promptly. 3AC liquidators alleged breach of contract, unjust enrichment, and breach of fiduciary duty, claiming FTX held $1.53 billion in hedge fund assets liquidated to settle $1.33 billion in liabilities. Three Arrows Capital was one of the industry's largest crypto hedge funds with $3 billion in assets before its June 2022 collapse. FTX has also filed lawsuits to reclaim funds, including ones against SkyBridge Capital, Binance, and Waves founder. FTX filed for bankruptcy in November 2022.

news.headline: Basilea receives milestone payment due to robust Cresemba® (isavuconazole) sales in Asia Pacific and China.
Hong Kong Marriage Equality introduces "Proud Pair" to reshape traditions for diverse gender groups with jewelry.
news.summary: A historic 700-year-old tradition is undergoing transformation to embrace diversity in gender groups, with Hong Kong Marriage Equality teaming up with local jewellery brand Playback. The collaboration aims to promote equal marriage and spread love without boundaries. This initiative is set in motion in Hong Kong on March 14, 2025.
